---
title: "The Database of Ranking Data in Political Science"
---

This page provides access to the political rankings database.

## Download

The complete database is available as a single ZIP file.

[⬇ Download the database (ZIP)](files/political-rankings.zip)

## Codebook

The guide to our database is available as a single codebook.

[⬇ Download the codebook (PDF)](files/codebook.pdf)
